tactical_shape: Controlled the game and punished Algeria's backline with direct, efficient attacks
standout_players: Lionel Messi: scored a hat-trick on his 200th cap and was the clear match star
Rodrigo De Paul: supplied the pass for Messi's opening goal
Alexis Mac Allister: his shot led directly to Messi's second goal
fatigue_injuries: Lionel Messi had been recovering from a muscle injury in recent weeks
home_read.momentum: A comfortable opening win and three points leave Argentina moving toward the last 32, with Messi continuing to drive the narrative.

tactical_shape: High-energy approach, particularly in the closing moments of the first half
Promising exchanges but ultimately lacked competitiveness
standout_players: Farès Chaïbi: had an early finish ruled out for offside
away_read.momentum: Despite some lively spells, Algeria were undone by poor finishing and now face a must-win feel to their next match against Jordan.
